mnemonics: BoS Battle of Styles: Bach's order vs. Stravinsky's chaos in a coordination game. Remember 'Battle of Styles' to recall the payoff conflict.
keyPoints: A two-player coordination game also known as the 'Battle of the Sexes'.
Players want to coordinate on an activity (e.g., Bach concert or Stravinsky ballet) but have different preferences on which one.
There are two pure-strategy Nash Equilibria: (Bach, Bach) and (Stravinsky, Stravinsky).
commonMistakes: Misidentifying it as a zero-sum or purely competitive game; it is a coordination game with a conflict of interest.
Forgetting that the mixed-strategy Nash Equilibrium exists but is typically Pareto inferior to the pure-strategy equilibria.
